info.title: Consent & Preferences - Consent Interfaces
info.description: The Consent Interfaces APIs are used to integrate external systems and streamline the flow of data with Consent & Preferences user interfaces.

tags.name: Preferences V2
tags.description: The Consent Interfaces APIs are used by Consent & Preferences user interfaces to retrieve data subjects' preferences.

get.description:
Use this API to retrieve a list of all consent preferences for a data subject identifier. The response will include details such as the consent date, purpose preferences, and data subject's geolocation. The response will also include relevant information about data elements and last interaction date, along with the current status of consent for the purposes that the data subject has interacted with.

> 🗒 Things to Know
> 
> - This API uses a JSON Web Token (JWT) authorization token that will be passed to OneTrust servers to ensure authenticated access to a user's consent profile. This is not the OAuth 2.0 client credential or API key. This JWT authorization token is generated using the cross-device consent process. For more information, see [Cross-Domain and Cross-Device Consent](https://my.onetrust.com/s/article/UUID-750c79df-692c-7418-a395-af2acaa45601).
> - This API does not require an intermediary server-server API call. It is optimized for client-side applications, maintaining security to make quick decisions based on data subject consent.
> - The response of this API will not return updates made via the [Update Data Subject's Preferences in a Preference Center API](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/updatepreferencesfordatasubjectapiusingput).

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: The data subject identifier of the data subject.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the OneTrust account. This value is obtained from the OneTrust Platform by clicking the User icon in the Global Header and copying the ID that appears below the email address.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The JSON web token (JWT) that will be passed to OneTrust servers to ensure authenticated access to a user's consent profile. This JWT authorization token is generated using the [cross-device consent process](https://my.onetrust.com/s/article/UUID-750c79df-692c-7418-a395-af2acaa45601).

identifier.description: The data subject identifier of the data subject.

identifierType.description: The type of data subject identifier.

dataElements.description: The additional information about the data subject provided via a consent receipt.

additionalIdentifiers.description: The additional data subject identifiers of the data subject.

purposes.description: The details of the purposes that the data subject interacted with.

latestGeolocation.description: The geolocation details of the most recent consent receipt.

language.description: The language set for the data subject.

lastReceiptDate.description: The date and time that the last consent receipt was received.

isFullyProcessed.description: This flag indicates whether the consent receipt is fully processed.

id.description: The unique identifier of the purpose.

consentDate.description: The date and time that the data subject provided consent for the purpose.

customPreferences.description: The details of the purpose preferences that the data subject interacted with.

lastInteractionDate.description: The most recent date and time that the data subject interacted with the purpose.

geolocation.description: The geolocation details of the consent receipt.

id.description: The unique identifier of the purpose preference associated with the purpose.

options.description: The unique identifiers of the purpose preference options that the data subject interacted with.

id.description: The unique identifiers of the purpose preference options.

receiptGuid.description: The unique identifier of the consent receipt for which geolocation details were sent.

country.description: The country where the consent interaction occurred.

state.description: The state code where the consent interaction occurred.

stateName.description: The name of the state where the consent interaction occurred.
